name: worklog

descriptions.claude: Turn work sessions into reviewed session logs and project logs.
descriptions.codex: Explicit Worklog tracking and reviewed project context for agent work.
descriptions.short: Turn sessions into reviewed project context.
descriptions.long: Worklog captures local source events, stores user-approved templates for session logs and project logs, helps the assistant author reviewed project-log rollups, and generates concise resume context for future agent tasks. Shared projects keep drafts local and publish only approved artifacts.

default_prompts: Start Worklog setup for this project.
